header.title: ORB3X Utils API
header.subtitle: One API surface for tax verification, translation, and currency conversion

nif.title: NIF Verification
nif.response: Returns taxpayer information including name, type, status, and tax residency

translate.title: Text Translation
translate.request: Accepts {text, to, from?} in request body
translate.response: Returns translated text with detected source language

exchange.title: Currency Exchange
exchange.description: Get currency rates and convert amounts
exchange.response: Returns unit rates or converted amounts for all currencies
